description: The image displays the official logo for the "Land Monitoring Service", rendered in a lime green colour. The logo features an icon on the left side, consisting of a partial circular outline that encompasses two symbolic elements: three vertical bar-like shapes of varying heights, suggestive of urban development or data trends, and a stylized wheat ear or plant stalk with several leaves, representing agriculture or natural vegetation. The text "Land" is positioned above "Monitoring Service", both in a sans-serif font.
